NetSparkleUpdater.​UI.​WPF.​IconUtilities
public
NetSparkleUpdater.​UI.​WPF.​IconUtilities

Helper class for processing Icon objects and converting them to ImageSource objects

Functions
ToImageSource
public static ImageSource? ToImageSource(
Icon? 
icon
)

Convert System.Drawing.Icon to System.Windows.Media.ImageSource.  From: https://​stackoverflow​.com​/a​/6580799​/3938401

Parameter
icon
Icon?

The Icon that should be converted to an ImageSource

Returns

An ImageSource representation of the given icon if icon is non-null
